'''bayuzhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pyemia|pyemia]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-y-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pyemia|pyemia]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| bayuzhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || bæyizhith || bæyizhij || bæyizhish || bæyizhi
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || bayuyuzhuth || bayuyuzhuj || bayuyuzhush || bayuyuzhu
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || bayuzhuth || bayuzhuj || bayuzhush || bayuzhu
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || bayufzhufth || bayufzhufj || bayufzhufsh || bayufzhuf
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || bayuzhuthu || bayuzhuju || bayuzhushu || bayuzhuku
|-
| [[Patient]] || bayuzhuth || bayuzhuj || bayuzhush || bayuzhu
|-
| [[Possessive]] || bayuzhuthul || bayuzhujul || bayuzhushul || bayuzhukul
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || bayuzhuuthuthu || bayuzhuujuju || bayuzhuushushu || bayuzhuuku
|-
| [[Dative]] || bayuzhuthun || bayuzhujun || bayuzhushun || bayuzhukun
|-
| [[Speaker]] || bayuzhuthuoro || bayuzhujuoro || bayuzhushuoro || bayuzhukuoro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
